---
title: "ASE Data Pipeline Overview"
format: html
---

# What this doc covers

- Dataset config & auto-discovery (`ASEDatasetConfig`)
- Typed views (`TypedSample`, `CameraView`, `TrajectoryView`, `SemiDenseView`, `GTView`)
- Mesh handling
- Conversion helpers (EFM3D remapping)
- Visualization hooks (Streamlit/Plotly/pytransform3d)
- Testing notes

All examples assume the `aria-nbv` conda env and repo root as CWD.

```{python}
from oracle_rri.data.dataset import ASEDatasetConfig

sample = next(iter(ASEDatasetConfig(verbose=False).setup_target()))
sample.rich_summary()  # concise overview
```

---

# Dataset config & auto-discovery

- **Auto tar resolution**: if `tar_urls` is empty, shards are globbed under resolved ATEK root; if `scene_ids` are provided, only those subdirs are used.
- **Mesh resolution**: when `load_meshes=True`, meshes are loaded from `.data/ase_meshes/scene_ply_{scene}.ply` (or inferred from `scene_ids`).
- **Console logging**: shard resolution is logged via `Console` for transparency.

---

# Typed views

```{python}
sample.camera_rgb         # CameraView
sample.camera_slam_left   # CameraView
sample.camera_slam_right  # CameraView
sample.camera_rgb_depth if "mfcd#camera-rgb-depth+images" in sample.flat else None
sample.trajectory         # TrajectoryView
sample.semidense          # SemiDenseView
sample.gt                 # GTView (obb2/obb3/efm_gt/rri_targets)
sample.mesh               # trimesh.Trimesh or None
```

- **CameraView**: images `(F,C,H,W)`, intrinsics, T_device_camera; uses `PoseTW` convention.
- **TrajectoryView**: `ts_world_device` `(F,3,4)`, timestamps, gravity.
- **SemiDenseView**: per-frame SLAM points + stds + volume bounds.
- **GTView**: parses `obb3_gt`, `obb2_gt`, `scores`, `efm_gt`, `rri_targets`; preserves raw.

Friendly display:

```{python}
print(sample.summary())   # compact dict; hides None fields, truncates long lists
```

---

# Mesh handling

- Mesh loaded once per scene (cached if `cache_meshes=True`).
- Mesh shape hints in repr: `{'verts': N, 'faces': M}`.

---

# Conversion to EFM3D schema

```{python}
efm_dict = sample.to_efm_dict(include_mesh=False)
```

Maps ATEK keys to EFM3D (`rgb/img`, `pose/t_world_rig`, `points/p3s_world`) using `EfmModelAdaptor` if available; falls back to a minimal mapping otherwise.

---

# Visualization hooks

- **Streamlit demo**: `streamlit run -m oracle_rri.visualization.candidate_app`
  - Sidebar: load real ASE sample, scene picker, next-sample button
  - Shows candidate positions (Plotly) + optional frustums (`pytransform3d.plot_camera`)
  - Uses real intrinsics from sample for frustum rendering
- **Mesh viewer**: `streamlit run -m oracle_rri.viz.mesh_viz` (synthetic cube if no mesh passed)

---
